summary: The diff successfully implements REQ-1 by adding logic to disable the 'Add Comment' button when the comment textarea is empty or contains only whitespace. The implementation includes visual styling via the disabled state and maintains existing submission functionality when enabled.

hallucinated_features.description: Button is also disabled when actionType or outcome fields are empty
hallucinated_features.reason: The BuildRequest explicitly states in Non-goals: 'Validating other form fields (action, outcome dropdowns)'. The diff shows the button is disabled based on multiple conditions: isButtonDisabled = !actionType || !outcome || isCommentsEmpty || addActivityMutation.isPending. The actionType and outcome checks were not requested and violate the stated non-goals.
